SEARCH
Package plugin

Interface Analyzer

public interface Analyzer
This interface defines the methods to be implemented for an analyzer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Analyzer
    copy()
    Creates a configured copy of this analyzer instance.
    String
    getId_analyzer()
    Gets the analyzer identifier.
    String
    getMappingPath()
    Gets the mapping configuration path.
    String
    getUrl_upstream_lab27()
    Gets the upstream URL for lab27 transactions.
    String

    Gets the upstream URL for lab29 transactions.
    String
    info()
    Returns a human-readable summary of the analyzer configuration and state.
    boolean
    isListening()
    Checks if the analyzer is currently listening for incoming messages.
    String

    Handles the IHE LAB-27 query transaction.
    String

    Handles the IHE LAB-28 order broadcast transaction.
    String

    Handles the IHE LAB-29 status change transaction.

    listenDevice()
    Starts listening for messages from the analyzer.

    Sets whether messages should be archived.
    void
    setId_analyzer(String id_analyzer)
    Sets the analyzer identifier.
    void
    setIp_analyzer(String ip_analyzer)
    Sets the analyzer's IP address.
    void
    setMappingPath(String mappingPath)
    Sets the mapping configuration path.
    void
    setMode(String mode)
    Sets the operating mode (e.g., "client" or "server").
    void
    setOperationMode(String operation_mode)
    Sets the operating mode of the analyzer (batch or query).
    void
    setPort_analyzer(int port_analyzer)
    Sets the analyzer's connection port.
    void
    setType_cnx(String type_cnx)
    Sets the connection type (e.g., "socket").
    void

    Sets the message type (e.g., "HL7").

    Sets the upstream URL for lab27 transactions.

    Sets the upstream URL for lab29 transactions.
    void
    setVersion(String version)
    Sets the analyzer version.
    void
    stopListening()
    Stops listening and releases sockets (server and client).
    String
    test()
    Returns the plugin name identifier (used by settings key analyzer.plugin).

  • Method Details

    • getId_analyzer

      String getId_analyzer()
      Gets the analyzer identifier.
      Returns:
      The analyzer ID.

    • setId_analyzer

      void setId_analyzer(String id_analyzer)
      Sets the analyzer identifier.
      Parameters:
      id_analyzer - The analyzer ID.

    • getUrl_upstream_lab27

      String getUrl_upstream_lab27()
      Gets the upstream URL for lab27 transactions.
      Returns:
      The lab27 upstream URL.

    • setUrl_upstream_lab27

      void setUrl_upstream_lab27(String url)
      Sets the upstream URL for lab27 transactions.
      Parameters:
      url - The lab27 upstream URL.

    • getUrl_upstream_lab29

      String getUrl_upstream_lab29()
      Gets the upstream URL for lab29 transactions.
      Returns:
      The lab29 upstream URL.

    • setUrl_upstream_lab29

      void setUrl_upstream_lab29(String url)
      Sets the upstream URL for lab29 transactions.
      Parameters:
      url - The lab29 upstream URL.

    • setVersion

      void setVersion(String version)
      Sets the analyzer version.
      Parameters:
      version - The version string.

    • setType_cnx

      void setType_cnx(String type_cnx)
      Sets the connection type (e.g., "socket").
      Parameters:
      type_cnx - The connection type.

    • setType_msg

      void setType_msg(String type_msg)
      Sets the message type (e.g., "HL7").
      Parameters:
      type_msg - The message type.

    • setArchive_msg

      void setArchive_msg(String archive_msg)
      Sets whether messages should be archived.
      Parameters:
      archive_msg - "Y" to enable archiving, "N" to disable.

    • setOperationMode

      void setOperationMode(String operation_mode)
      Sets the operating mode of the analyzer (batch or query).
      Parameters:
      operation_mode - The operating mode.

    • setMode

      void setMode(String mode)
      Sets the operating mode (e.g., "client" or "server").
      Parameters:
      mode - The operating mode.

    • setIp_analyzer

      void setIp_analyzer(String ip_analyzer)
      Sets the analyzer's IP address.
      Parameters:
      ip_analyzer - The IP address.

    • setPort_analyzer

      void setPort_analyzer(int port_analyzer)
      Sets the analyzer's connection port.
      Parameters:
      port_analyzer - The port number.

    • copy

      Analyzer copy()
      Creates a configured copy of this analyzer instance.
      Returns:
      A copy of the current analyzer.

    • test

      String test()
      Returns the plugin name identifier (used by settings key analyzer.plugin).
      Returns:
      Plugin identifier string.

    • info

      String info()
      Returns a human-readable summary of the analyzer configuration and state.
      Returns:
      Human-readable information string.

    • lab27

      String lab27(String msg)
      Handles the IHE LAB-27 query transaction. Typical flow (may vary depending on analyzer implementation): - Receives or builds a query and converts it into HL7 QBP^Q11. - Sends it to the upstream LIS endpoint (url_upstream_lab27). - Receives an HL7 RSP^K11 response. - Converts the response into the analyzer-specific format and sends it to the analyzer.
      Parameters:
      msg - HL7 message payload.
      Returns:
      HL7 response message.

    • lab28

      String lab28(String str_OML_O33)
      Handles the IHE LAB-28 order broadcast transaction. Typical flow: - Receives an HL7 OML^O33 message from upstream. - Converts it into the analyzer-specific format and sends it to the analyzer. - Receives analyzer response and converts it to HL7 ORL^O34.
      Parameters:
      str_OML_O33 - HL7 OML^O33 message.
      Returns:
      HL7 ORL^O34 response message.

    • lab29

      String lab29(String msg)
      Handles the IHE LAB-29 status change transaction. Typical flow: - Receives a status change from the analyzer and converts it into HL7 OUL^R22. - Sends it to the upstream LIS endpoint (url_upstream_lab29). - Receives an HL7 acknowledgement/response. - Converts it into the analyzer-specific format and sends it back to the analyzer if applicable.
      Parameters:
      msg - HL7 message payload.
      Returns:
      HL7 response/acknowledgement message.

    • getMappingPath

      String getMappingPath()
      Gets the mapping configuration path.
      Returns:
      The mapping configuration path.

    • setMappingPath

      void setMappingPath(String mappingPath)
      Sets the mapping configuration path.
      Parameters:
      mappingPath - The mapping configuration path.

    • listenDevice

      void listenDevice()
      Starts listening for messages from the analyzer. The behavior depends on the type of connection (e.g., "socket").

    • isListening

      boolean isListening()
      Checks if the analyzer is currently listening for incoming messages.
      Returns:
      True if the analyzer is listening, false otherwise.

    • stopListening

      void stopListening()
      Stops listening and releases sockets (server and client).
